keyCocoon: Zero-Knowledge Credential Bridge for webSlinger Automation
keyCocoon enables secure, automated login workflows for webSlinger without ever exposing your passwords. It serves as a secure communication bridge between webSlinger automation and keyBunker credential storage, maintaining absolute separation between automation logic and sensitive credential data.

How It Works

When webSlinger executes an automation script that encounters a login form:

webSlinger sends a credential request to keyCocoon specifying the domain, username, and target form field
keyCocoon retrieves encrypted credentials from keyBunker (your local credential vault)
keyCocoon injects the password into the login form and submits it
Credentials exist in memory for less than 1 second, then are immediately cleared
keyCocoon responds to webSlinger with success/failure status only—never the actual credential

Critical Security Principle: webSlinger never receives or handles your passwords. keyCocoon acts purely as a secure bridge, performing credential injection while keeping passwords completely isolated from automation logic.

Multi-Factor Authentication Support

keyCocoon enables automation of TOTP-based multi-factor authentication:

keyBunker stores TOTP shared secrets alongside passwords in your encrypted vault
When webSlinger requests a TOTP code, keyCocoon retrieves the current 6-digit code from keyBunker
Only the generated code (valid for 30 seconds) is transmitted—the shared secret never leaves keyBunker
keyCocoon injects the code into the MFA form, enabling complete authentication automation

This allows webSlinger to automate login workflows for banking, healthcare, and corporate systems that require multi-factor authentication.

Master Password Authentication

keyCocoon cannot access credentials without your authorization:

Enter your keyBunker master password when prompted
Select an authentication duration (from 5 minutes up to 24 hours)
keyCocoon can fulfill credential requests from webSlinger during the authorized time window
After expiration, keyCocoon prompts for the master password again

Your authentication duration preference is the only data keyCocoon stores locally.

Zero-Knowledge Architecture:

keyCocoon never stores credentials—only handles them transiently during injection
Credentials exist in memory for less than 1 second during form filling
No caching, buffering, or persistence of sensitive information

Local-Only Operation:

All credential storage happens in keyBunker's encrypted vault on your device
No network transmission of credentials
No cloud synchronization or remote storage
All communication happens locally through browser extension APIs

Encryption:

Credentials are encrypted both at rest in keyBunker and during transmission to keyCocoon
Encryption keys are generated fresh for each credential request and discarded immediately after use

No Tracking:

No logging of credentials, TOTP codes, or domain/username combinations
No analytics, telemetry, or usage tracking

webSlinger Integration:

The status of keyCocoon is displayed on the webSlinger overlay via the color of the keyCocoon icon
Green: keyCocoon installed and authenticated
Yellow: keyCocoon installed but authentication expired
Red: keyCocoon not installed

Setup Requirements

Chrome or Chromium-based browser
webSlinger browser extension
keyBunker credential management suite

Setup instructions and downloads available at: https://webslinger.ai

Execute multiple extension actions with customizable hotkey chains

Hotkey Chain lets you execute a sequence of actions (an action chain) with a single hotkey, improving browsing efficiency. You can visually edit action chains with drag-and-drop sorting, per-step delays, command execution, and extension management.

- Main Features
  - Run an action chain with one click; supports multiple chains and drag-and-drop sorting
  - Page and tab operations: scroll to top/bottom, refresh, forward/back, open/close/duplicate/pin tabs
  - Content and zoom: copy URL/title, add bookmark, focus address bar, zoom in/out/reset
  - Advanced capabilities: clear cache, wait, execute commands, call other extensions
  - Extension management: enable/disable, uninstall (with confirmation), open options/details/homepage, reload development extensions

- Usage
  - After installation, create/edit action chains in the extension’s “Options” page; click the toolbar icon to run the default chain
  - Set custom hotkeys (e.g., run chain 1/2/3) at `chrome://extensions/shortcuts`

- Internationalization
  - Built-in English/Simplified Chinese; switch languages in the “Options” page to localize menus, notifications, etc.

- Privacy & Local Storage
  - Configuration is stored only in local/synced storage; no collection or transmission of personal data; no changes to search or homepage settings

NetSense – Intelligent Site Proctoring & Request Tracking

NetSense is a powerful browser extension designed to monitor and log network requests made by specific websites, helping users track and analyze external communications efficiently. Whether you're conducting research, enforcing security policies, or managing third-party service usage, NetSense provides deep insights into how websites interact with different domains.

Key Features:
🔍 Proctor Specific Websites & Origins
Define the top-level domains where NetSense should be active, ensuring that only relevant websites are monitored.

🌐 Track Sub-links & External Requests
>Automatically detects and lists sub-links (URLs or URL prefixes) that a website 
communicates with.
>Users can select which URLs they are interested in tracking, refining the focus for analysis.

📡 Custom API Endpoints for Real-time Data Transfer
>Define API endpoints (your custom server URLs) where NetSense will send structured NetSense objects whenever tracked sites make requests.
>API endpoints function independently—you must manually associate them with specific sub-links using the "Edit" button for granular control.

📜 Global Logging for Research & Selective Logging for Precision
>Global Logging Mode logs all network requests from monitored domains—ideal 
for initial research.
>Once you’ve identified key sub-links, disable global logging and enable logging only for specific sub-links, ensuring efficient and focused tracking.

🔄 Real-time Auto-filtering for Large Data Sets
> Input fields feature auto-filtering, dynamically narrowing down entries as you type—perfect for managing when your storage grows.

🏢 Office Mode for Secure Enterprise Use
>Enforce account authentication with an email and password, ensuring only verified users can modify tracking settings.
>If an employee attempts to modify IndexedDB or disable the extension, NetSense immediately notifies the owner to maintain security.
>This is particularly useful for third-party service monitoring, such as tracking coupon generation, service usage, or any other business-critical activities performed by employees on behalf of an organization.

🔐 Privacy-first Approach – No Server-side Tracking
> All data is stored locally on the client-side, eliminating concerns about server tracking or data leakage.
> Users have full control over which domains and sub-links are monitored, ensuring transparency and flexibility.

Why Choose NetSense?
✅ Effortless monitoring of external network requests from specific websites.
✅ Customizable logging options for both research and precision tracking.
✅ Secure enterprise mode to prevent unauthorized modifications.
✅ Zero server-side tracking – all data stays on your device.

🔹 Gain full visibility over website interactions and take control of your network monitoring with NetSense!
Open source extension that removes comments/recommendations from Youtube: https://github.com/funblaster22/focused_youtube

Thank you to makaroni4/focused_youtube for the base extension! (https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/focused-youtube/nfghbmabdoakhobmimnjkamfdnpfammn)

🔍 Focused Youtube (FY) is a Chrome Extension that helps you stay focused by blocking recommendations and other elements on Youtube.

❤️ FY does not track any user data. It's a simple Vanilla JS application made with only one purpose – to help you avoid Youtube's rabbit hole.

✨ Changes from upstream
- category enforcement
- subscribe to playlists (app.js:initSubscriptions)
- desaturate thumbnails
- Show only first 2 comments
- Only allow videos and playlist tabs on channel pages
- Redirect shorts to their video equivalent (thus no infinite scroll)
- always keep enabled
- Block videos from known problematic channels that I waste time on and regret (app.js:isBannedChannel)

There is a notable lack of GUI customization options because this is customized to suit my needs and intended for a developer audience. If it really gains traction I might consider it.
Monitor active Chrome extensions and provide proctoring functionality.

BlinkSecure: Seamless Security for BlinkExam Online Tests
BlinkSecure is a specialized Chrome extension designed to enhance the security of online exams conducted through the official BlinkExam platform. By creating a controlled and cheating-free environment, BlinkSecure ensures that candidates can only focus on their exams without any distractions or unauthorized actions.
Key features include:
Full-Screen Mode: Automatically locks the exam page into full-screen, preventing tab switching or window changes.
No Copy-Paste: Disables copy-paste functionality to protect the integrity of the exam.
Seamless Integration with BlinkExam: Exclusively works with the BlinkExam platform, ensuring a secure and seamless testing experience.
Cheating Prevention: Blocks any attempts to leave the test window or access other applications.
Perfect for schools, universities, and remote proctoring, BlinkSecure guarantees a fair, secure, and distraction-free exam environment on BlinkExam.

Protect your AI chats and audit every extension's permissions — the only tool that does both.

AI Chat Shield protects your AI conversations and audits your installed browser extensions in one place.

Malicious or over-permissioned extensions can access AI chat sites, browsing history, clipboard data, cookies, page content, and account-related permissions. AI Chat Shield helps you review those risks with a clear, local-first dashboard.

HOW IT WORKS

AI Chat Shield scans your installed extensions and evaluates declared permissions, host access, install source signals, and AI platform targeting. Each extension receives a 0 to 100 risk score with a transparent factor breakdown so you can see why it was flagged.

Core scoring signals include:

Host Permission Breadth: How many sites can this extension access?
AI Platform Targeting: Does it explicitly target AI chat platforms or broadly cover them?
Network Capabilities: Can it intercept or modify requests through powerful extension permissions?
General Permission Risks: Does it request access to history, clipboard, identity, privacy, downloads, cookies, or system-level APIs?
Publisher and Install Source Signals: Was it installed from the Chrome Web Store or through a higher-risk path?

WHAT WE DETECT

- AI chat exposure on supported AI platforms
- Data harvesting risks involving history, bookmarks, downloads, and cookies
- Privacy intrusion risks such as clipboard, geolocation, and privacy-setting access
- Content injection capabilities that can alter or capture page content
- System access such as native messaging, debugger access, and extension management
- Identity and authentication access that could increase account risk

WHAT YOU GET FOR FREE

- On-demand extension scan with detailed risk scores
- Clear risk grouping for AI Chat Risks, General Risks, and Low Risk extensions
- Full dashboard with risk distribution, category filters, and extension breakdowns
- Individual extension analysis with permissions, risk categories, and recommended actions
- Quick actions to disable or remove flagged extensions
- Coverage for major AI providers
- Recent scan history stored locally on your device

WHAT PRO CURRENTLY ADDS ($1.99/month or $19.99/year)

- Activity Log access inside the app
- Visibility into extension install, removal, scan, and monitored AI session events
- Pro subscription status and renewal tracking inside the extension

YOUR PRIVACY

AI Chat Shield does not read, store, or transmit your AI conversation content or browsing history. It analyzes extension metadata, declared permissions, host access, and risk signals only. Scan results and recent history stay in local extension storage on your device. We do not use analytics, tracking, or advertising.

AI platform detection is based on URL pattern matching only. It does not inspect page content.

If you choose Pro, subscription validation sends only your email address to our server to verify subscription status. No scan contents, browsing data, or chat contents are sent.

Built by a cybersecurity company, not an ad company.

Enterprise-managed one-tab detention lockdown for school Chromebooks.

Detention One-Tab Pro is a managed Chrome extension designed for schools using Google Workspace for Education.

The extension enforces a strict one-tab browsing environment during a configurable detention period. If a student attempts to open a second tab or window, the unauthorized tab is closed and the attempted website is loaded in the active tab so that teachers can immediately see what the student tried to access.

Key features:
• Restricts students to a single browser tab
• Automatically closes additional Chrome windows
• Converts links that open in new tabs to open in the current tab
• Overrides JavaScript pop-ups and window.open() calls
• Activates only during administrator-defined times
• Supports Google Admin managed settings via schema.json
• Optional audit logging of bypass attempts
• Detects whether the Securly Classroom extension is installed and enabled
• No user interface or controls visible to students
• Designed for force installation on managed Chromebooks

This extension is intended solely for use by educational institutions on school-managed devices.

Streamline your data collection with a free Email Extractor. Extract emails from any webpage automatically.

Automatically extract email addresses from any website you browse — no clicks, no manual copy-pasting, no monthly fees. Free Email Scrapper silently scans every page in real time and builds your contact list while you work. Open the popup and your emails are already waiting.

Used by marketers, recruiters, sales teams, SEO professionals, and business developers to collect leads 10x faster than any manual method.


✅ WHY CHOOSE Free Email Scrapper?
✔ 100% Free — no subscription, no paywalls, no limits on emails collected
✔ Automatic — works silently in the background as you browse
✔ Fast — emails appear instantly the moment a page loads
✔ Private — all data stays in your browser. Nothing is sent to any server
✔ Clean — RFC 5321 validated addresses only. No junk, no duplicates


⚡ KEY FEATURES OF Free Email Scrapper
📧 AUTOMATIC EMAIL EXTRACTION
Scans every page you visit automatically. Works on static sites, dynamic pages, JavaScript-rendered content, and single-page applications (SPAs). No button to press — just browse and collect.

🔍 SMART EMAIL SCRAPER ENGINE
Our advanced email scraper detects addresses hidden in plain text, mailto: links, obfuscated contact sections, and dynamically loaded content. Powered by RFC 5321-compliant validation to ensure every address in your list is real and properly formatted.

📤 EXPORT IN 3 FORMATS
Export your scraped email list instantly:
• CSV — includes email, domain, page title, URL, and date found. Ready for Excel, Google Sheets, or any CRM
• TXT — clean plain-text list, one email per line, ideal for bulk email tools
• JSON — structured data for developers and API integrations

📋 COPY TO CLIPBOARD
Copy a single email address with one click, or copy your entire collected list to clipboard in one tap. Paste directly into Gmail, Outlook, HubSpot, Mailchimp, or any outreach tool.

🔎 INSTANT SEARCH & FILTER
Search your collected emails in real time as you type. Find any address instantly even when you've collected hundreds.

🟢 LIVE STATUS BADGE
Color-coded badge on your toolbar shows collection status at a glance:
• Green = actively collecting on this page
• Orange = page not injectable (browser/extension pages)
• Red = collection paused

⏸ PAUSE & RESUME ANYTIME
Toggle email collection on or off instantly. Your collected emails are preserved — nothing is lost when you pause.

🔒 PRIVACY-FIRST DESIGN
Free Email Scrapper is 100% local. All extracted emails are stored in your browser's own storage (browser.storage.local). No accounts. No sign-ups. No data sent to external servers. Ever.

👥 WHO IS THIS EXTENSION FOR?
🎯 Sales Professionals — Build prospect lists and find B2B leads while researching company websites
📣 Digital Marketers — Collect emails for outreach campaigns, cold email, and email marketing
🧑‍💼 Recruiters — Scrape contact details from job boards, LinkedIn company pages, and directories
🔗 SEO & Link Builders — Find webmaster contact emails for outreach and link building campaigns
🛍 E-commerce Owners — Gather supplier and partner contacts while browsing industry sites
📰 Journalists & Researchers — Collect press contact emails from media and publication websites
💻 Developers & Data Analysts — Extract structured contact data and export to JSON or CSV


🆚 Free Email Scrapper VS OTHERS
Unlike other email scrapers that charge monthly fees, cap your usage, or require cloud accounts — Free Email Scrapper is completely free, works entirely offline, and has no extraction limits. Your data never leaves your device.

• No account required
• No API rate limits
• No per-export fees
• No cloud storage of your data


📋 HOW TO USE Free Email Scrapper
1️⃣ Install Free Email Scrapper
2️⃣ Browse any website — emails are collected automatically
3️⃣ Click the extension icon to open your email list
4️⃣ Search, filter, copy, or export your contacts
5️⃣ Export as CSV, TXT, or JSON for use in any tool

Removes all the Shorts from YouTube™

Block Shorts for Youtube™: Clean Up Your Feed
Block Shorts for Youtube™ is a Chrome extension designed for users who prefer a streamlined, distraction-free YouTube experience. It automatically removes all Shorts content from the platform — eliminating vertical videos, Shorts carousels, and Shorts-only sections from your homepage, subscriptions, and search results. If you find Shorts intrusive or irrelevant, this extension restores the classic YouTube layout you know and love.

The extension works silently in the background, modifying the page structure as soon as YouTube loads. It targets Shorts elements using precise selectors and hides them without affecting the rest of the site. You’ll still see full-length videos, playlists, and channels — but Shorts will be gone. It’s ideal for users who want to focus on long-form content, tutorials, documentaries, or any material that benefits from depth and duration.

The interface is minimal and symbolic, with no clutter or configuration required. A simple icon in the toolbar lets you toggle the extension on or off. There are no menus, no settings, and no distractions — just a clean feed every time you open YouTube. The design philosophy is simple: remove what you don’t want, and let the rest shine.

Performance is fast and lightweight. The extension runs entirely on the client side, without tracking, data collection, or external requests. It doesn’t interfere with video playback, subscriptions, or recommendations — it simply filters out Shorts before they reach your screen. This makes it a privacy-friendly and efficient solution for customizing your YouTube experience.

Whether you're a student, professional, or casual viewer, Block Shorts for Youtube™ helps you reclaim your attention and focus on the content that matters. It’s a small tool with a big impact — restoring clarity, reducing noise, and giving you control over your feed.

Add it to Chrome and enjoy YouTube without Shorts — just the videos you want, every time you browse.
